name: HBV_S_gene_overlapping_P
description: HBV surface gene (S ORF) encoding PreS1/PreS2/S (HBsAg) on the same strand as polymerase (P ORF) in a different reading frame, fully overlapping. The 'a-determinant' (aa 124-147 of S) is the major neutralizing epitope and the basis of HBsAg-based vaccination and diagnostic assays; mutations here (G145R) cause vaccine-escape phenotypes that complicate read assignment between vaccine-strain and wildtype references. Because S and P overlap, any S mutation also alters P; this constrains evolution and creates hidden linkage between drug-resistance (P) and immune-escape (S) variants.
expected_copy_count: 1 per genome; overlapping reading frame with P
